coverage_rules.block_message: Render/UI/asset change without canonical screenshot or browser-test update.
Audio change without sfx/audio-graph test update.
Sim/engine/world/ai/tick change without unit or browser test.
Render/asset change requires e2e screenshot pass.

ban_patterns.message: Use mulberry32(seed) from src/engine/prng.ts — engine/world/ai/store code must be replayable (canonical byte-stability).
No wall-clock in determinism-gated code (incl. window./globalThis. prefixed) — pass time in from the caller; engine/world/ai/store must be replayable.
Use a named RNG_TAGS constant from src/engine/prng.ts, not a raw-hex XOR tag — the determinism contract must have one source of truth.
No-network invariant: this is a fully client-side game with no backend. Runtime network reopens the remote-asset parse + exfil attack surface. Use the A() asset helper for first-party bundle assets.
CI-8 — no dangerouslySetInnerHTML: this game injects no HTML and has an untrusted URL-flag input boundary; raw HTML injection is a needless XSS surface. Render text/JSX, not innerHTML.
No Objexiv imports — this is a standalone game.
No Next.js imports — this is a Vite-only project.
